name: Room Cleaning
description: Housekeeping request to clean the patient room floor and surfaces.
example_utterances: can someone come and sweep and mop the floor
the room is dirty, please send housekeeping
i need housekeeping for my room
please send someone to clean the room

name: Washroom Cleaning
description: Clean the attached bathroom / toilet / washroom.
example_utterances: please send someone to clean the washroom
the toilet is smelly, please clean
the bathroom floor is wet and dirty

name: Bedpan Cleaning
description: Empty and clean the patient's bedpan / urinal.
example_utterances: the bedpan needs to be emptied
please dispose of the bedpan contents

name: Bed Cleaning
description: Wipe and disinfect the patient bed surface.
example_utterances: there is a spill on my bed

name: AC Remote Required
description: Patient needs the air-conditioner remote control.
example_utterances: please give me the air conditioner remote
can i get the remote for the ac
there is no ac remote in the room

name: AC Not Working
description: The air conditioner is completely non-functional.
example_utterances: air conditioner is not turning on
the air conditioner is off and won't start

name: AC Not Cooling
description: AC is running but not cooling the room properly.
example_utterances: air conditioner is on but the room is hot
room is warm even with ac on
ac is running but no cold air

name: AC Assistance
description: Generic help required with the AC (settings, mode, temperature).
example_utterances: i need help with the ac
how do i set the ac temperature
please adjust the ac for me

name: TV Remote Required
description: Patient needs the television remote control.
example_utterances: please give me the tv remote
can i get the tv remote

name: TV Channels Not Coming
description: TV is powered on but channels are not tuning in.
example_utterances: cable is not working on the tv

name: TV Not Working
description: TV is completely non-functional.

name: TV Assistance
description: Generic help with the TV (volume, input, tuning).
example_utterances: i need help with the tv
please assist me with the television
how do i change the input on the tv
please tune the tv for me

name: Patient Gown Required
description: Patient needs a fresh hospital gown.
example_utterances: please bring me a hospital gown
can i get another patient gown

name: Bedsheet Required
description: Patient needs a fresh bedsheet.
example_utterances: bring me a new bed sheet
the bedsheet is dirty please replace

name: Bath Towel
description: Patient needs a fresh bath towel.
example_utterances: please bring me a fresh towel

name: Pillow Required
description: Patient needs an extra pillow or a fresh pillow cover.
example_utterances: please give me an extra pillow
can i get a fresh pillow

name: Electric Socket Not Working
description: Power socket / plug point is not delivering electricity.
example_utterances: the electric socket is not working
the wall socket is not working

name: Fan Not Working
description: Ceiling or table fan is not functioning.
example_utterances: ceiling fan is not turning on

name: Geyser Not Working
description: Water heater / geyser is not producing hot water.
example_utterances: no hot water from the geyser

name: Electric Socket Charged / Shock Risk
description: Live current / shock reported at the socket - electrical safety issue.
example_utterances: i got a shock from the plug point
there is current in the metal near the socket

name: Tap Leaking
description: Water tap / faucet is leaking.
example_utterances: water is leaking from the tap

name: Plumber Required
description: General plumbing help needed.
example_utterances: please send a plumber to my room

name: Water Drainage Issue
description: Water is not draining or drainage is blocked.
example_utterances: washroom is flooding, water not going down

name: Wall Mending
description: Wall damage / plaster / paint needs mending.
example_utterances: plaster is coming off the wall
there is a hole in the wall
please repair the wall in my room

name: Water Seepage
description: Water is seeping through the wall or ceiling.
example_utterances: there is water seepage in my room
water is coming from the ceiling
the wall is wet due to seepage
damp patch on the wall due to water

name: Carpenter Required
description: Carpentry work needed (door, furniture, wood).
example_utterances: the door is broken, please send a carpenter
please send a carpenter for wood repair

name: Male PCA Required
description: A male patient care attendant is needed to assist the patient.
example_utterances: need a male helper for the patient

name: Female PCA Required
description: A female patient care attendant is needed to assist the patient.
example_utterances: need a female helper for the patient

name: Patient Urine Discharge Assistance
description: Assistance needed for patient urine discharge / catheter bag emptying.
example_utterances: patient needs help with urine discharge
patient wants to urinate, need help
urine bag needs to be emptied

name: Patient Gown Change Assistance
description: Help required to change the patient's gown.
example_utterances: please help me change the patient gown
patient's gown needs to be changed

name: Thali Meal
description: Standard Indian thali meal (full plate).
example_utterances: i want to order a thali meal

name: Cornflakes
description: Cornflakes with milk for breakfast.

name: Tea
description: A cup of tea.
example_utterances: i want a cup of tea

name: Oats
description: Oats / oatmeal for breakfast.
example_utterances: i would like oats for breakfast

name: Biscuits
description: Snack biscuits with tea or coffee.

name: Porridge
description: Wheat / rice porridge (dalia / kheer style).
example_utterances: can i get porridge for breakfast

name: Boiled Eggs
description: Boiled eggs.
example_utterances: please bring me two boiled eggs

name: Doctor Consultation Delay
description: Complaint about delay in doctor consultation / rounds.
example_utterances: the doctor has not come yet
there is a delay in doctor consultation
we have been waiting for the doctor

name: Lab Service Delay
description: Complaint about delay in lab sample collection or reports.
example_utterances: lab has not come to collect the sample
there is a delay in lab service
when will the lab report come

name: Registration Delay
description: Complaint about delay at registration / admission counter.
example_utterances: we have been waiting for registration

name: Billing Delay
description: Complaint about delay in billing or discharge paperwork.
example_utterances: we are waiting for the bill

name: Unresponsive Staff
description: Complaint that staff is not responding to calls or requests.
example_utterances: no one is coming when i call
we have been ringing the bell for a long time

name: Staff Behavior Impolite
description: Complaint about rude / impolite behavior by hospital staff.
example_utterances: we want to complain about staff behavior

name: Adequate Information Not Being Provided
description: Complaint that adequate information about treatment / process is not being provided.
example_utterances: no one is giving us proper information
we are not being informed about the treatment
please tell us what is happening
information is not being shared with us
we don't know what is going on
